name: Ozempic Jumpers Protocol
goal: Manage GLP-1 agonist therapy (semaglutide/tirzepatide) for weight loss with muscle preservation, side effect mitigation, and rebound prevention
goal_ru: Сопровождение терапии GLP-1 агонистами (семаглутид/тирзепатид) для снижения веса с сохранением мышечной массы, управлением побочными эффектами и предотвращением отката

red_flags.action: Increase protein to 2.2g/kg + strength training intensity

red_flags.threshold: >3 days unable to keep food down
red_flags.action: Consult prescribing physician —可能需要 dose adjustment
Emergency: rule out pancreatitis or cholecystitis
Increase caloric intake, preserve lean mass

phases.name: Initiation (Weeks 1-4)
phases.description: Dose escalation, side effect adaptation, establish baseline metrics
phases.description_ru: Эскалация дозы, адаптация к побочным эффектам, установка базовых метрик
actions: Start protein at 1.6g/kg body weight minimum
Begin strength training (3x/week, full body)
Log daily: nausea, appetite, energy, bowel movements
Weigh daily, body composition weekly
Set caloric floor (never <1400 kcal/day for women, <1800 for men)
Hydrate 2.5-3L/day with electrolytes

phases.name: Active Weight Loss (Weeks 5-24)
phases.description: Sustained weight loss with muscle preservation focus
phases.description_ru: Устойчивое снижение веса с фокусом на сохранение мышц
actions: Increase protein to 2.0-2.2g/kg lean mass target
Strength training 4x/week (progressive overload)
Track fat mass vs lean mass ratio weekly
If muscle loss >1% per month → increase calories + protein
Blood work every 3 months: iron, B12, folate, vitamin D, zinc
GI management: ginger tea, small frequent meals (6-8x/day)

phases.name: Tapering & Habit Integration (Weeks 25-36)
phases.name_ru: Снижение дозы и интеграция привычек (25-36 недели)
phases.description: Gradual dose reduction while reinforcing lifestyle habits
phases.description_ru: Постепенное снижение дозы с закреплением привычек образа жизни
actions: Gradually reduce dose over 8-12 weeks (never stop abruptly)
Increase caloric intake to maintenance level (~200-300 kcal/day more)
Emphasize habit autonomy: the user MUST maintain eating habits without medication
Continue strength training 3-4x/week
Weekly check-ins with coach/dietitian
Monitor for emotional eating triggers returning

phases.name: Maintenance / Rebound Prevention (Weeks 37+)
phases.description: Long-term weight maintenance after GLP-1 discontinuation
phases.description_ru: Долгосрочное поддержание веса после отмены GLP-1
actions: Continue tracking: weight (daily), body comp (weekly)
Maintain protein at 1.6g/kg minimum lifelong
Strength training 2-3x/week minimum
If weight regain >2 kg in a month → activate emergency intervention
Monthly check-ins for 6 months post-medication
Rebound risk: >80% of users regain weight within 1 year without habit change

recommendations: NEVER skip strength training — muscle loss is the #1 hidden risk of GLP-1 weight loss
Protein target 1.6-2.2g/kg — use shakes if food intake is too low
Small frequent meals (6-8x/day) to manage nausea and maintain nutrient intake
Hydrate aggressively — GLP-1s reduce thirst sensation
Track body composition, not just weight — fat loss ≠ healthy loss
Plan for medication tapering from day 1 — habit change is the real treatment
Gallstone prevention: avoid very low fat diets, include healthy fats daily
Bowel management: fiber 25-30g/day + magnesium + hydration to prevent constipation
Do NOT start GLP-1 without concurrent strength training prescription
Consider creatine (5g/day) for additional muscle preservation support
contraindications: Personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma
BMI <27 without type 2 diabetes (off-label use varies by country)
references: WHOOP Behavior Framework — GLP-1 companion protocol design
DPP Trial — 5-7% weight loss → 58% diabetes risk reduction
American Gastroenterological Association — GLP-1 management guidelines
Wilding et al. (2021) — Once-Weekly Semaglutide in Adults with Overweight or Obesity (NEJM)
